display_text: Misericorde, Cost: 0: Tier 3 neutral item. Provides Dark Mercy passive - your attacks deal 3 more damage for each 7% HP the enemy is missing. This makes it a powerful tool for finishing off low-health targets and scales damage significantly during prolonged fights or against high-health enemies. Stats: Damage per missing HP: 3, HP threshold per stack: 7%.
